grant_title: HOME CHDO (Community Housing Development Organizations) Program
project_area: Affordable housing for low-income households (rent or homeownership), including rehabilitation, new construction, conversion of non-residential properties, and direct rental assistance
demographic_requirements: Low-income households (generally defined as having an adjusted gross income below 80% of the applicable area median income). Rental units must be affordable (≤35% of gross income for rent/utilities, 40% for age-restricted units). Homeownership units must not exceed 28% of household income for mortgage, taxes, insurance, and fees.
eligibility_summary: Must be a State-certified CHDO. Non-profit organizations must submit CHDO documentation to the Department and be certified as a CHDO. Projects must include rehabilitation, new construction, or conversion of non-residential properties to residential use. Rental units must be permanent housing. Construction of 12+ units requires Davis-Bacon Act prevailing wage rates.
